rulings.Case Title: CARMEN DOMINGUEZ VS. RAQUEL MCGILL ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Discovery, To Establish Admissions From Pltfs, And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff; Memo Of P&A
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Monday February 1, 2019 Line 1. DEFENDANT RAQUEL MCGILL Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Discovery, To Establish Admissions From Pltfs, And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff; Memo Of P&A is OFF CALENDAR, dismissal on file. (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: XIAO PIAN VS. LAURIE BANGERT ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Re-Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Monday February 1, 2019 Line 2. DEFENDANT LAURIE BANGERT, DENISE BROWN Re-Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons is DENIED. To the extent Defendant makes a Delta motion, it is DENIED. See Borsuk v. Appellate Division (2015) 242 Cal.App.4th 607. To the extent Defendant makes a motion based on improper service, Defendants failed to show that service has not been accomplished in any manner authorized by law. Additionally, while defendants rely on Exhibit A to their declarations, no such exhibit is attached. = (501/CFH)
